creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Henning Matyschok from comment #7)
I'm sorry Henning, but I don't understand what you are talking about.

I'm talking about net/vether-kmod/Makefile. The patch you provided can not be applied cleanly because the context of the patch is different from the file. And it is different because of the $FreeBSD$ line.

Also, I don't know what you are referring about committing upstream, sorry.
